scope: Supplemental AI adoption and usage proxies outside Anthropic's Claude.ai country usage index.
caveat: These metrics use different denominators and collection methods. Do not merge them into the Anthropic usageIndex without explicit normalization and labeling.

enterpriseAdoptionMetrics.population: Enterprises with 10 persons employed or more; all activities except agriculture, forestry and fishing, mining and quarrying, and the financial sector.

source.name: Eurostat — Artificial intelligence by size class of enterprise

enterpriseAdoptionMetrics.comparability: Enterprise adoption survey metric; comparable across listed European reporting countries, but not comparable to consumer MAU or Anthropic Claude.ai usageIndex.

enterpriseAdoptionMetrics.population: Businesses with 10 or more persons employed; total activities.

source.name: OECD ICT Access and Usage by Businesses

enterpriseAdoptionMetrics.comparability: Enterprise adoption survey metric; partially harmonised via OECD/Eurostat ICT survey methodology, not comparable to consumer MAU or Anthropic usageIndex.

individualGenerativeAIUsageMetrics.population: Individuals aged 16-74; total sex, education, income, and employment-status breakdowns.

source.name: OECD ICT Access and Usage by Individuals
source.measure: D1X_I — Individuals using the internet for using generative AI tools - last 3 months

individualGenerativeAIUsageMetrics.comparability: Individual generative-AI usage survey metric; comparable across listed OECD/partner reporting countries, not comparable to enterprise adoption or product MAU.

usCensusBusinessAIMetrics.population: Employer firms, total for all sectors (NAICS2017=00). TECHUSE=T1E03B99 means Artificial Intelligence: Total use.

source.name: U.S. Census Annual Business Survey — Technology Characteristics of Businesses

usCensusBusinessAIMetrics.comparability: U.S. employer-firm technology-use survey metric from 2018; predates the generative-AI wave and is not comparable to 2025 generative-AI usage surveys.

source.name: China's generative AI users double to 515 mln: report
source.publisher: Xinhua / State Council of the People's Republic of China

countrySurveyMetrics.comparability: Country survey/user-base metric; not directly comparable to Anthropic Claude.ai usageIndex.

source.name: China's generative AI users double to 515 mln: report
source.publisher: Xinhua / State Council of the People's Republic of China

countrySurveyMetrics.comparability: Penetration survey metric; not a per-product activity count.

source.name: China's generative AI users double to 515 mln: report
source.publisher: Xinhua / State Council of the People's Republic of China

countrySurveyMetrics.comparability: Growth in broad user base; not product-level usage.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report

chinaAppMarketMetrics.comparability: Market/category MAU; likely includes overlapping users across AI application forms.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report

chinaAppMarketMetrics.comparability: Category-scale MAU; overlaps with other categories and cannot be summed.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report

chinaAppMarketMetrics.comparability: Category-scale MAU; overlaps with AI search and app/plugin usage.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report

chinaAppMarketMetrics.comparability: Token-volume estimate; not comparable to user-count metrics.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report
QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Ranking report coverage
source.primaryUnderlyingSource: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Layer Development Core Report

chinaNativeAppMau.comparability: Product MAU for a China-native AI app; not comparable to Anthropic country usageIndex.

source.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Ranking report coverage
source.primaryUnderlyingSource: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Layer Development Core Report

chinaNativeAppMau.comparability: Product MAU for a China-native AI app; not comparable to Anthropic country usageIndex.

developerSurveyMetrics.population: Stack Overflow Developer Survey respondents; public TidyTuesday single-response subset only.

source.name: Stack Overflow Annual Developer Survey 2024 — TidyTuesday derived single-response subset

developerSurveyMetrics.comparability: Developer survey proxy; country values are respondent shares, not population-representative national adoption rates.

distribution.label: No, and I don't plan to
No, but I plan to soon
Good, but not great at handling complex tasks
Neither good or bad at handling complex tasks
Very poor at handling complex tasks
Very well at handling complex tasks

countries.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

openModelDownloadProxies.comparability: Developer/open-model proxy; not consumer app usage.
Developer/open-model proxy; not consumer app usage.
Developer/open-model proxy; not consumer app usage.
Developer/open-model proxy; not consumer app usage.
Developer/open-model proxy; not consumer app usage.

developerEcosystemProxies.comparability: Developer ecosystem proxy; no country split and no end-user usage measurement.

aiResearchActivityMetrics.population: AI publications by reporting country from the OECD.AI dataset as exposed through World Bank Data360.

source.name: World Bank Data360 — OECD Artificial Intelligence dataset

aiResearchActivityMetrics.comparability: Country-level AI research activity proxy; not usage/adoption by firms or individuals.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: Similarweb
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Useful for web traffic and country share across AI products, but the official API is commercial; undocumented extension endpoints are intentionally not used.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: Sensor Tower / data.ai / AppMagic
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Useful for mobile AI app downloads and MAU estimates, but high-quality country-level data is generally commercial.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: Google Trends
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Search-interest proxy is accessible manually, but the unofficial Trends endpoint returned HTTP 429 in automated collection and has no official stable public API.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: US Census Annual Business Survey Technology Characteristics
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Collected from Census ABS 2018 abstcb with TECHUSE=T1E03B99.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: OECD ICT Access and Usage Database
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Collected businesses using AI (G14_B) and individuals using generative AI tools (D1X_I) via OECD SDMX API.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: Stack Overflow Developer Survey
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Collected developer AI-tool usage and attitude distributions from the public TidyTuesday single-response subset of the 2024 Stack Overflow Developer Survey.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: World Bank Data360 / OECD.AI
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: Collected latest country-level AI publications totals from the OECD_AI dataset exposed by World Bank Data360.

sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.name: CNNIC Statistical Reports
sourceCatalogForFutureCollection.reason: CNNIC report pages and PDFs are available; specific generative-AI figures were verified via a government-hosted Xinhua summary.
